title: ShazuTheOG_
description:
Name: ShazuTheOG
Type: PvP / SMP / FPS Boost / Realistic / Themed
Resolution: [16x / 32x / 64x, etc.]
Compatible Versions: [1.20+ – 1.21+]
body:
This texture pack is designed for smooth, fast, and immersive gameplay. Whether you're fighting in intense PvP battles, surviving in SMP worlds, or just exploring Minecraft, this pack enhances your experience with optimized visuals and clean textures. Key features include low-lag blocks, clear swords, short fire, FPS-friendly particles, and improved GUI for better visibility.

Features:

✅ FPS-boosted textures

⚔️ Clean and minimal PvP items

🌍 Simplified terrain and ores for quick recognition

🎯 Clear crosshair and custom HUD

🔥 Short fire + low-lag particles

🌙 Custom sky (optional, if supported)


Perfect For: PvP players, SMP grinders, and anyone who wants performance without sacrificing style.
